completed: Stabilized Guided Tour UI and eliminated cascading renders
Removed distracting background blurs and animations from Guided Tour
Improved bulk action clarity by auto-selecting items during tour steps
Refactored GuidedTour to use parent-controlled lifecycle for better performance
in_progress: Monitoring faculty portal for any further UI inconsistencies
pending: Responsive audit for static highlight outline

decisions.context: React cascading render warning in GuidedTour effect
decisions.decision: Moved state reset logic to parent via mounting/unmounting with AnimatePresence
decisions.trade_offs: Requires AnimatePresence in every parent, but guarantees consistent state reset and better performance
